---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What can't you do today? Describe the gap, not the solution yet.

## Proposed solution

What would you add or change? Which script(s) or folder(s) does it touch?

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you tried or looked at instead (post-install script, another tool, manual process)?

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits offline image servicing (build-server or reference-VM phase) — not a runtime/
      post-deployment concern (that belongs in your MDT/Intune tooling, not this repo)
- [ ] This doesn't require organization-specific assumptions to be useful to other users

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, links to relevant Microsoft docs, whatever helps.
